verifiedClaims.claim: prom-client is the standard for Node.js Prometheus integration.

unverifiedClaims.claim: OS-level disk I/O metrics are consistently available across OS types via Node.
unverifiedClaims.notes: May vary between Windows and Linux. May need OS-specific libraries if requirements get very granular.

implementationPatterns.name: Push vs Pull
implementationPatterns.description: System will use Pull (Prometheus scrapes) for infra metrics and Push (Direct to DB) for dashboard real-time data.
